user.title: Home Keeper
user.description: Set up Home Keeper to track home maintenance and chores. Manage your tasks from the Home Keeper panel in the sidebar.

abort.already_configured: Home Keeper is already set up.

init.title: Home Keeper options
init.description: Mirror binary sensors with the "problem" device class as tasks. A synced task stays active while its sensor reports a problem and clears automatically when the source integration resolves it; it can't be completed in Home Keeper. Exclude specific sensors, devices, areas, or labels below.

data_description.one_off_retention_days: Auto-delete a completed one-off task this many days after it is completed. 0 keeps completed one-offs forever.

add_task.name: Add task
add_task.description: Create a new maintenance task or chore.

recurrence_type.name: Recurrence type
recurrence_type.description: floating (measured from completion), fixed (anchored schedule), or one-off (do-once, uses a due date).

interval.name: Interval
interval.description: Repeat every N units (floating) or steps (fixed).

unit.name: Unit
unit.description: For floating tasks: days, weeks, or months.

freq.name: Frequency
freq.description: For fixed tasks: DAILY, WEEKLY, or MONTHLY.

anchor.name: Anchor
anchor.description: For fixed tasks: ISO datetime of the first occurrence (sets the time of day).

due.name: Due date
due.description: For one-off tasks: ISO datetime the task is due. Optional; defaults to now (due today).

sensor.name: Sensor trigger
sensor.description: For sensor tasks: a mapping with the bound numeric sensor — entity_id, mode (usage or threshold) and the mode's fields.

last_completed.name: Last completed
last_completed.description: Optional 'last done' date. Seeds an initial completion so a floating task starts measured from this date (next due = last done + interval) instead of being due immediately. Omit for a task that has never been done.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: Optional device to attach this task to.

area_id.name: Area
area_id.description: Optional area to associate with this task.

update_task.name: Update task
update_task.description: Update fields of an existing task.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The id of the task to update.

anchor.name: Anchor
anchor.description: ISO datetime of the first occurrence (fixed).

due.name: Due date
due.description: ISO datetime the task is due (one-off).

sensor.name: Sensor trigger
sensor.description: Sensor binding for a sensor task — entity_id, mode and the mode's fields (replaces the whole binding).

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: Device to attach this task to.

area_id.name: Area
area_id.description: Area to associate with this task.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The id of the task to delete.

force.name: Force
force.description: Bypass deletion protection for a task managed by another integration. Use this to clean up a task whose managing integration was uninstalled or is misbehaving and can't remove it itself.

complete_task.name: Complete task
complete_task.description: Mark a task complete and advance its recurrence.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The id of the task to complete.

update_completion.name: Update completion
update_completion.description: Amend the metadata (note, cost, photo, who) of an already-recorded completion, identified by its timestamp. Does not change the schedule or due date.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The id of the task whose completion you are editing.

ts.name: Completion timestamp
ts.description: The ISO timestamp (ts) of the completion entry to edit.

trigger_task.name: Trigger task
trigger_task.description: Arm a condition-driven (triggered) task so it reads as due now — the owner-facing counterpart to Complete task (which clears it back to dormant). Idempotent; only valid for triggered tasks.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The id of the triggered task to arm.

snooze_task.name: Snooze task
snooze_task.description: Defer a task's due date without recording a completion or advancing its recurrence.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The id of the task to snooze.

hours.name: Hours
hours.description: How many hours to defer the task (defaults to 24).

skip_task.name: Skip task
skip_task.description: Advance a task to its next occurrence without recording a completion.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The id of the task to skip.

set_task_consumable.name: Link task to a consumable
set_task_consumable.description: Link a task to an appliance consumable/part so completing it consumes one spare from the part's stock and fires a low-stock event at the reorder threshold. Omit asset_id and part_id to clear the link.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The id of the task to link (or unlink).

asset_id.name: Asset ID
asset_id.description: The id of the appliance the consumable belongs to. Omit to unlink.

part_id.name: Part ID
part_id.description: The id of the consumable/part to link. Omit to unlink.

notify.name: Notify what's due
notify.description: Send an actionable push notification for what's currently due — name a saved notification or profile, optionally overriding the notify target.

notification.name: Notification
notification.description: Name or id of a saved notification (uses its profile + delivery).

profile.name: Profile
profile.description: Name or id of a saved profile (filter) to send.

target.name: Target
target.description: Notify services to send to, overriding the profile (e.g. mobile_app_phone).

list_tasks.name: List tasks
list_tasks.description: Return all tasks as a response.

list_profiles.name: List profiles
list_profiles.description: Return the saved profiles (named task filters) as a response.

add_asset.name: Add appliance
add_asset.description: Register an appliance/asset. By default Home Keeper creates a virtual device for it; set kind to existing to attach metadata to a device from another integration.

name.name: Name
name.description: Display name (required for a new virtual device).

kind.name: Kind
kind.description: virtual (Home Keeper creates the device) or existing (attach to one).

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: Existing device to attach metadata to (required when kind is existing).

serial_number.name: Serial number
serial_number.description: Serial number (shown in the appliance's device-page info block).

cost.name: Cost
cost.description: Replacement cost (feeds the insurance inventory value rollup).

documents.name: Documents
documents.description: Manuals/warranties/receipts: a list of links or uploaded files. This service adds link documents (name + url); upload files from the panel.

metadata.name: Metadata
metadata.description: Free-form metadata entries (label, type text/link/date, value); a date with track:true also becomes a sensor.

parts.name: Parts
parts.description: Structured parts/wear items; wear items with an interval drive a maintenance task.

parent_asset_id.name: Parent appliance
parent_asset_id.description: Make this a subdevice of another appliance.

related_device_ids.name: Related devices
related_device_ids.description: Other registry devices to associate with this appliance.

update_asset.name: Update appliance
update_asset.description: Update fields of an existing appliance/asset.

asset_id.name: Asset ID
asset_id.description: The id of the asset to update.

serial_number.name: Serial number
serial_number.description: Serial number (shown in the appliance's device-page info block).

cost.name: Cost
cost.description: Replacement cost (feeds the insurance inventory value rollup).

parts.name: Parts
parts.description: Structured parts/wear items; wear items with an interval drive a maintenance task.

parent_asset_id.name: Parent appliance
parent_asset_id.description: Make this a subdevice of another appliance.

related_device_ids.name: Related devices
related_device_ids.description: Other registry devices to associate with this appliance.

delete_asset.name: Delete appliance
delete_asset.description: Delete an appliance/asset. Its virtual device (if any) is removed and tasks attached to it become standalone.

asset_id.name: Asset ID
asset_id.description: The id of the asset to delete.

list_assets.name: List appliances
list_assets.description: Return all appliances/assets as a response.

adjust_part_stock.name: Adjust part stock
adjust_part_stock.description: Change a part's on-hand spare count by a signed delta (clamped at zero). When a decrease reaches or crosses the reorder threshold, a low-stock event fires.

asset_id.name: Asset ID
asset_id.description: The id of the appliance the part belongs to.

part_id.name: Part ID
part_id.description: The id of the part whose stock to adjust.

delta.name: Delta
delta.description: Signed change to apply to the spare count (e.g. -1 to consume, 2 to restock).

add_asset_document.name: Add appliance document
add_asset_document.description: Attach a link document (manual/warranty/receipt) to an appliance. Upload files from the panel; this service handles links only.

asset_id.name: Asset ID
asset_id.description: The id of the appliance to attach the document to.

document.name: Document
document.description: The document to add: an object with name and url.

remove_asset_document.name: Remove appliance document
remove_asset_document.description: Detach a document from an appliance. An uploaded file's stored copy is deleted from disk too.

asset_id.name: Asset ID
asset_id.description: The id of the appliance the document belongs to.

document_id.name: Document ID
document_id.description: The id of the document to remove.

update_asset_document.name: Update appliance document
update_asset_document.description: Edit an existing document on an appliance — rename it, or (for link documents) change its URL. Uploaded file documents can only be renamed.

asset_id.name: Asset ID
asset_id.description: The id of the appliance the document belongs to.

document_id.name: Document ID
document_id.description: The id of the document to edit.

changes.name: Changes
changes.description: The fields to change: an object with an optional name and (for link documents) an optional url.

export_inventory.name: Export inventory
export_inventory.description: Return a home inventory for insurance as a response (one row per appliance plus totals), with a ready-to-save CSV under the "csv" key.

set_options.name: Set options
set_options.description: Update Home Keeper's integration options — the same settings as the panel's Settings tab and the options flow. Only the fields you pass change.

one_off_retention_days.name: One-off retention (days)
one_off_retention_days.description: Auto-delete a completed one-off task this many days after completion. 0 keeps them forever.

notify_no_targets.message: This notification has no target to send to — add a "Send to" device in Settings → Notifications, or pass target: when calling the service.
